question: According to Veolia's HR performance data on page 21, what were the average training hours per employee from 2019 to 2022, and what was the percentage of women among managers and in external management recruitment over the same period? Cite the exact page where this data is reported.
answers: Average training hours per employee: 18h (2019), 17h (2020), 21h (2021), 26h (2022), with a 2023 target of 23h (page 21). Women among managers: 21.1% (2019), 21.4% (2020), 21.7% (2021), 22.3% (2022). Women in external recruitment of managers on permanent contracts: 27.3% (2019), 28.3% (2020), 29% (2021), 30% (2022). The data tables are displayed on page 21 of the report.

Training hours: 18h (2019) → 17h (2020) → 21h (2021) → 26h (2022), 2023 target 23h. Women managers: 21.1% → 21.4% → 21.7% → 22.3%. Women in external management recruitment: 27.3% → 28.3% → 29% → 30%. All on page 21.
